summary: MemOS is a Memory Operating System designed for LLMs and AI agents, enabling context-aware and personalized interactions through a unified memory management system. It supports multi-modal memory and efficient memory operations, making it ideal for applications requiring long-term memory capabilities.
use_cases: Personalized AI chatbots that remember user preferences
Multi-agent systems sharing a common memory for collaborative tasks
Knowledge management systems that utilize documents and URLs for long-term memory
